current_cursor_readback.active_market_set: Same-source stock-market-regimes US equity/index panel consumed from existing `130600` weekly/monthly rollup only. Active parent denominator stays `MainRegimeV2`: `Bull`, `Bear`, `Sideways`, `Crisis`; `Manipulation` remains separate direct evidence. No unsupported market/species cells were promoted.
current_cursor_readback.active_timeframes: Axiswise source-consensus gate accepted all four `1w` roots and all four `1mo` roots. Retained `125122` daily parent-root gates, `130102` scoped cross-context `1d/1w/15m/1h`, and direct `Manipulation` event/order-lifecycle evidence. Unsupported intraday/full-species cells remain open.
current_cursor_readback.blocker: Full-cycle/full-universe matrix is still incomplete: same-source `1w/1mo` US equity/index cells now pass 8/8, but unsupported intraday/full-species cells remain open; direct `Manipulation` varieties such as spoofing/layering with matched negatives, quote stuffing, pinging, bear raid, and painting-the-tape remain open.
current_cursor_readback.next_action: Stop broad negative sweeps on same-source monthly roots; target unsupported intraday/full-species `MainRegimeV2` cells with native or broader source-label panels, while keeping direct `Manipulation` matched-negative acquisition as separate direct-evidence work and never promoting OHLCV proxies

next_action: Target one native/broader source-label panel for unsupported intraday/full-species MainRegimeV2 cells; keep direct Manipulation matched-negative acquisition separate and fail-closed.

concrete_success_criteria: Bull, Bear, Sideways, and Crisis each have 95% calibrated evidence.
The evidence survives other markets and other timeframes.
The expanded full-cycle/full-species matrix is either covered or explicitly scoped down by the user.
Manipulation is validated through direct event/order-flow/order-lifecycle/social/on-chain evidence with matched controls, not OHLCV proxies.
Only after all blockers close can update_goal be called.
